2026-03-16T15:12:01.575120+00:00Z.question: Which regions are driving quarterly performance?

query_decomposition.intent_summary: Identify which campus regions are driving quarterly performance by calculating current-quarter sales, prior-quarter sales, QoQ growth %, national QoQ growth %, and each region's contribution % to national current-quarter sales, using the most recent available week_end_date to define the current quarter and applying weekly-average normalization if either quarter is incomplete.

subqueries.name: max_week_end_date_cte
subqueries.purpose: Identify the most recent available week_end_date to anchor the definition of the current quarter.
subqueries.logic: Compute MAX(week_end_date) from data_867.

subqueries.name: quarter_calendar_cte
subqueries.purpose: Derive calendar quarter start/end dates for the current quarter (containing max_week_end_date) and the immediately prior quarter, and determine completeness for each quarter.
subqueries.logic: Using max_week_end_date, derive current_quarter_start (first day of the calendar quarter containing max_week_end_date) and current_quarter_end (last day of that calendar quarter). Derive prior_quarter_start and prior_quarter_end as the immediately preceding calendar quarter boundaries. Determine completeness: current_complete = (max_week_end_date >= current_quarter_end) and prior_complete = (max_week_end_date >= prior_quarter_end).

subqueries.name: week_inclusion_cte
subqueries.purpose: When normalization is required (at least one quarter incomplete), determine which weeks (week_end_date) belong to each quarter using the >=3-day overlap rule, and provide the included week_end_date lists and week counts.
subqueries.logic: For each week_end_date, define week_window = [week_end_date - 6 days, week_end_date]. For each target quarter window [quarter_start, quarter_end], compute overlap_days between week_window and target quarter. Include the week in that quarter only if overlap_days >= 3. Produce per quarter: list of included week_end_date values and count of included weeks. Apply only if (NOT current_complete) OR (NOT prior_complete).

subqueries.name: region_quarter_metrics_cte
subqueries.purpose: Compute region-level current and prior quarter sales using totals when both quarters are complete; otherwise compute weekly averages using the included weeks and ensure consistent comparison basis.
subqueries.logic: Group by campus_region. If current_complete AND prior_complete: compute SUM(relmora_total_mg) for records in current quarter and prior quarter (anchored to calendar quarters; no week inclusion logic). Else: restrict records to included weeks for each quarter from week_inclusion_cte; compute total_sales_per_quarter and weekly_avg_sales_per_quarter = total_sales_per_quarter / included_week_count for both quarters.

subqueries.name: nation_quarter_metrics_cte
subqueries.purpose: Compute national current and prior quarter metrics using the same basis as region calculations (totals if both complete; otherwise weekly averages), to enable nation growth and Higher/Lower comparison.
subqueries.logic: At national level (no grouping). Use the same completeness decision and, if normalization is needed, the same included week logic and week counts as used for region calculations to compute either total quarter sales or weekly average quarter sales for current and prior quarters.

subqueries.name: final_calc_cte
subqueries.purpose: Compute QoQ growth %, contribution % to national current-quarter sales, and Higher/Lower vs nation growth; enforce 0-to-positive growth rule and integer rounding requirements.
subqueries.logic: For each region: select the comparison_basis_sales_current and comparison_basis_sales_prior (either totals or weekly avgs, consistently). Compute region_growth_pct = CASE WHEN prior=0 AND current>0 THEN 100% ELSE ((current-prior)/prior)*100% END. Compute nation_growth_pct similarly using nation values. Compute performance_vs_nation = 'Higher' if region_growth_pct > nation_growth_pct else 'Lower' (tie treated as 'Lower' unless explicitly specified otherwise). Compute region_contribution_pct = (region_current_total_sales / nation_current_total_sales)*100%, where totals refer to current-quarter totals (not weekly averages) unless normalization is required; if normalization is required, use comparison-basis current values consistently for both numerator and denominator. Convert all growth and percentage computations to integers (no decimals) prior to output and append '%'.

validation_rules: Use data_867 and metric column relmora_total_mg (no competitor/market share columns).
Determine max_week_end_date using MAX(week_end_date); do not use system date; do not use MAX(quarter_year) because it is a string.
Define current quarter as the calendar quarter containing max_week_end_date; define prior quarter as the immediately preceding calendar quarter using calendar boundaries (not dataset min/max).
Determine completeness for each quarter using max_week_end_date >= quarter_end_date.
If both quarters are complete, aggregate quarter totals anchored to quarter_year without applying week inclusion logic.

If at least one quarter is incomplete, normalize BOTH quarters to weekly averages; apply the >=3-day overlap rule to determine included weeks; include output lists of week_end_date values used for each quarter's weekly average.
Never compare totals for one quarter to weekly averages for the other quarter; the comparison basis must match for both quarters.
Whenever performance is requested, include QoQ growth % and also include the corresponding absolute sales values for current and prior quarters.
All growth and percentage computations (growth_qoq_pct, region_contribution_pct, nation_growth_qoq_pct) must be integer values (no decimals) and include a '%' suffix.
If prior period value is 0 and current period value > 0, set growth to 100%.
Compute and include national QoQ growth and a Higher/Lower indicator for each region vs nation growth.
Default aggregation level for entities is campus-level; grouping by campus_region is allowed and should not roll up to parent entities.

2026-03-16T15:12:01.575120+00:00Z.final_sql:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
quarter_calendar_cte AS (
  SELECT
    m.max_week_end_date,
    DATE_SUB(DATE_ADD(DATE(m.max_week_end_date), INTERVAL (1 - QUARTER(m.max_week_end_date)) QUARTER), INTERVAL (DAYOFMONTH(DATE_ADD(DATE(m.max_week_end_date), INTERVAL (1 - QUARTER(m.max_week_end_date)) QUARTER)) - 1) DAY) AS current_quarter_start,
    LAST_DAY(DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(DATE_ADD(DATE(m.max_week_end_date), INTERVAL (1 - QUARTER(m.max_week_end_date)) QUARTER), INTERVAL (DAYOFMONTH(DATE_ADD(DATE(m.max_week_end_date), INTERVAL (1 - QUARTER(m.max_week_end_date)) QUARTER)) - 1) DAY), INTERVAL 2 MONTH)) AS current_quarter_end,
    DATE_SUB(
      DATE_SUB(DATE_ADD(DATE(m.max_week_end_date), INTERVAL (1 - QUARTER(m.max_week_end_date)) QUARTER), INTERVAL (DAYOFMONTH(DATE_ADD(DATE(m.max_week_end_date), INTERVAL (1 - QUARTER(m.max_week_end_date)) QUARTER)) - 1) DAY),
      INTERVAL 3 MONTH
    ) AS prior_quarter_start,
    DATE_SUB(
      DATE_SUB(DATE_ADD(DATE(m.max_week_end_date), INTERVAL (1 - QUARTER(m.max_week_end_date)) QUARTER), INTERVAL (DAYOFMONTH(DATE_ADD(DATE(m.max_week_end_date), INTERVAL (1 - QUARTER(m.max_week_end_date)) QUARTER)) - 1) DAY),
      INTERVAL 1 DAY
    ) AS prior_quarter_end,
    (m.max_week_end_date >= LAST_DAY(DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(DATE_ADD(DATE(m.max_week_end_date), INTERVAL (1 - QUARTER(m.max_week_end_date)) QUARTER), INTERVAL (DAYOFMONTH(DATE_ADD(DATE(m.max_week_end_date), INTERVAL (1 - QUARTER(m.max_week_end_date)) QUARTER)) - 1) DAY), INTERVAL 2 MONTH))) AS current_complete,
    (m.max_week_end_date >= DATE_SUB(
      DATE_SUB(DATE_ADD(DATE(m.max_week_end_date), INTERVAL (1 - QUARTER(m.max_week_end_date)) QUARTER), INTERVAL (DAYOFMONTH(DATE_ADD(DATE(m.max_week_end_date), INTERVAL (1 - QUARTER(m.max_week_end_date)) QUARTER)) - 1) DAY),
      INTERVAL 1 DAY
    )) AS prior_complete,
    (
      ((m.max_week_end_date >= LAST_DAY(DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(DATE_ADD(DATE(m.max_week_end_date), INTERVAL (1 - QUARTER(m.max_week_end_date)) QUARTER), INTERVAL (DAYOFMONTH(DATE_ADD(DATE(m.max_week_end_date), INTERVAL (1 - QUARTER(m.max_week_end_date)) QUARTER)) - 1) DAY), INTERVAL 2 MONTH))))
      AND
      ((m.max_week_end_date >= DATE_SUB(
        DATE_SUB(DATE_ADD(DATE(m.max_week_end_date), INTERVAL (1 - QUARTER(m.max_week_end_date)) QUARTER), INTERVAL (DAYOFMONTH(DATE_ADD(DATE(m.max_week_end_date), INTERVAL (1 - QUARTER(m.max_week_end_date)) QUARTER)) - 1) DAY),
        INTERVAL 1 DAY
      )))
    ) AS both_complete
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
quarter_year_labels_cte AS (
  SELECT
    qc.*,
    (SELECT d.quarter_year
     FROM data_867 d
     WHERE d.week_end_date = (
       SELECT MAX(d2.week_end_date)
       FROM data_867 d2
       WHERE d2.week_end_date BETWEEN qc.current_quarter_start AND qc.current_quarter_end
     )
     LIMIT 1
    ) AS quarter_year_current,
    (SELECT d.quarter_year
     FROM data_867 d
     WHERE d.week_end_date = (
       SELECT MAX(d2.week_end_date)
       FROM data_867 d2
       WHERE d2.week_end_date BETWEEN qc.prior_quarter_start AND qc.prior_quarter_end
     )
     LIMIT 1
    ) AS quarter_year_prior
  FROM quarter_calendar_cte qc
),
weeks_scoped_cte AS (
  SELECT d.week_end_date
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN quarter_year_labels_cte q
  WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN q.prior_quarter_start AND q.current_quarter_end
  GROUP BY d.week_end_date
),
week_inclusion_cte AS (
  SELECT
    q.max_week_end_date,
    q.current_quarter_start,
    q.current_quarter_end,
    q.prior_quarter_start,
    q.prior_quarter_end,
    q.current_complete,
    q.prior_complete,
    q.both_complete,
    q.quarter_year_current,
    q.quarter_year_prior,
    GROUP_CONCAT(
      CASE
        WHEN GREATEST(DATE_SUB(w.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), q.current_quarter_start)
             <= LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.current_quarter_end)
         AND (DATEDIFF(
                LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.current_quarter_end),
                GREATEST(DATE_SUB(w.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), q.current_quarter_start)
              ) + 1) >= 3
        THEN DATE_FORMAT(w.week_end_date, '%Y-%m-%d')
      END
      ORDER BY w.week_end_date SEPARATOR ','
    ) AS included_week_end_dates_current_qtr,
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN GREATEST(DATE_SUB(w.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), q.current_quarter_start)
             <= LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.current_quarter_end)
         AND (DATEDIFF(
                LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.current_quarter_end),
                GREATEST(DATE_SUB(w.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), q.current_quarter_start)
              ) + 1) >= 3
        THEN 1 ELSE 0
      END
    ) AS included_week_count_current_qtr,
    GROUP_CONCAT(
      CASE
        WHEN GREATEST(DATE_SUB(w.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), q.prior_quarter_start)
             <= LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.prior_quarter_end)
         AND (DATEDIFF(
                LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.prior_quarter_end),
                GREATEST(DATE_SUB(w.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), q.prior_quarter_start)
              ) + 1) >= 3
        THEN DATE_FORMAT(w.week_end_date, '%Y-%m-%d')
      END
      ORDER BY w.week_end_date SEPARATOR ','
    ) AS included_week_end_dates_prior_qtr,
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN GREATEST(DATE_SUB(w.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), q.prior_quarter_start)
             <= LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.prior_quarter_end)
         AND (DATEDIFF(
                LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.prior_quarter_end),
                GREATEST(DATE_SUB(w.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), q.prior_quarter_start)
              ) + 1) >= 3
        THEN 1 ELSE 0
      END
    ) AS included_week_count_prior_qtr
  FROM weeks_scoped_cte w
  CROSS JOIN quarter_year_labels_cte q
  GROUP BY
    q.max_week_end_date, q.current_quarter_start, q.current_quarter_end,
    q.prior_quarter_start, q.prior_quarter_end, q.current_complete, q.prior_complete, q.both_complete,
    q.quarter_year_current, q.quarter_year_prior
),
region_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.campus_region,
    MAX(wi.quarter_year_current) AS quarter_year_current,
    MAX(wi.quarter_year_prior) AS quarter_year_prior,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN wi.current_quarter_start AND wi.current_quarter_end THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS SIGNED) AS quarterly_sales_current_qtr,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN wi.prior_quarter_start AND wi.prior_quarter_end THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS SIGNED) AS quarterly_sales_prior_qtr,
    CAST(
      IF(
        MAX(wi.both_complete) = 1,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN wi.current_quarter_start AND wi.current_quarter_end THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END),
        SUM(
          CASE
            WHEN GREATEST(DATE_SUB(d.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), wi.current_quarter_start)
                 <= LEAST(d.week_end_date, wi.current_quarter_end)
             AND (DATEDIFF(
                    LEAST(d.week_end_date, wi.current_quarter_end),
                    GREATEST(DATE_SUB(d.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), wi.current_quarter_start)
                  ) + 1) >= 3
            THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0
          END
        ) / NULLIF(MAX(wi.included_week_count_current_qtr), 0)
      ) AS SIGNED
    ) AS comparison_basis_sales_current,
    CAST(
      IF(
        MAX(wi.both_complete) = 1,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN wi.prior_quarter_start AND wi.prior_quarter_end THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END),
        SUM(
          CASE
            WHEN GREATEST(DATE_SUB(d.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), wi.prior_quarter_start)
                 <= LEAST(d.week_end_date, wi.prior_quarter_end)
             AND (DATEDIFF(
                    LEAST(d.week_end_date, wi.prior_quarter_end),
                    GREATEST(DATE_SUB(d.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), wi.prior_quarter_start)
                  ) + 1) >= 3
            THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0
          END
        ) / NULLIF(MAX(wi.included_week_count_prior_qtr), 0)
      ) AS SIGNED
    ) AS comparison_basis_sales_prior,
    MAX(wi.included_week_end_dates_current_qtr) AS included_week_end_dates_current_qtr,
    MAX(wi.included_week_end_dates_prior_qtr) AS included_week_end_dates_prior_qtr,
    MAX(wi.both_complete) AS both_complete_flag
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN week_inclusion_cte wi
  WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN wi.prior_quarter_start AND wi.current_quarter_end
  GROUP BY d.campus_region
),
nation_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN wi.current_quarter_start AND wi.current_quarter_end THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS SIGNED) AS nation_quarterly_sales_current_qtr,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN wi.prior_quarter_start AND wi.prior_quarter_end THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS SIGNED) AS nation_quarterly_sales_prior_qtr,
    CAST(
      IF(
        MAX(wi.both_complete) = 1,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN wi.current_quarter_start AND wi.current_quarter_end THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END),
        SUM(
          CASE
            WHEN GREATEST(DATE_SUB(d.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), wi.current_quarter_start)
                 <= LEAST(d.week_end_date, wi.current_quarter_end)
             AND (DATEDIFF(
                    LEAST(d.week_end_date, wi.current_quarter_end),
                    GREATEST(DATE_SUB(d.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), wi.current_quarter_start)
                  ) + 1) >= 3
            THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0
          END
        ) / NULLIF(MAX(wi.included_week_count_current_qtr), 0)
      ) AS SIGNED
    ) AS nation_comparison_basis_sales_current,
    CAST(
      IF(
        MAX(wi.both_complete) = 1,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN wi.prior_quarter_start AND wi.prior_quarter_end THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END),
        SUM(
          CASE
            WHEN GREATEST(DATE_SUB(d.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), wi.prior_quarter_start)
                 <= LEAST(d.week_end_date, wi.prior_quarter_end)
             AND (DATEDIFF(
                    LEAST(d.week_end_date, wi.prior_quarter_end),
                    GREATEST(DATE_SUB(d.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), wi.prior_quarter_start)
                  ) + 1) >= 3
            THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0
          END
        ) / NULLIF(MAX(wi.included_week_count_prior_qtr), 0)
      ) AS SIGNED
    ) AS nation_comparison_basis_sales_prior,
    MAX(wi.both_complete) AS both_complete_flag
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN week_inclusion_cte wi
  WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN wi.prior_quarter_start AND wi.current_quarter_end
),
final_calc_cte AS (
  SELECT
    r.campus_region,
    r.quarter_year_current,
    r.quarter_year_prior,
    r.quarterly_sales_current_qtr,
    r.quarterly_sales_prior_qtr,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN r.comparison_basis_sales_prior = 0 AND r.comparison_basis_sales_current > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN r.comparison_basis_sales_prior = 0 AND r.comparison_basis_sales_current = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE ((r.comparison_basis_sales_current - r.comparison_basis_sales_prior) / NULLIF(r.comparison_basis_sales_prior, 0)) * 100
        END AS SIGNED
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS growth_qoq_pct,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        (
          CASE
            WHEN r.both_complete_flag = 1 THEN (r.quarterly_sales_current_qtr / NULLIF(n.nation_quarterly_sales_current_qtr, 0)) * 100
            ELSE (r.comparison_basis_sales_current / NULLIF(n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_current, 0)) * 100
          END
        ) AS SIGNED
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS region_contribution_pct,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_prior = 0 AND n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_current > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_prior = 0 AND n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_current = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE ((n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_current - n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_prior) / NULLIF(n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_prior, 0)) * 100
        END AS SIGNED
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS nation_growth_qoq_pct,
    CASE
      WHEN
        (
          CASE
            WHEN r.comparison_basis_sales_prior = 0 AND r.comparison_basis_sales_current > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN r.comparison_basis_sales_prior = 0 AND r.comparison_basis_sales_current = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ((r.comparison_basis_sales_current - r.comparison_basis_sales_prior) / NULLIF(r.comparison_basis_sales_prior, 0)) * 100
          END
        )
        >
        (
          CASE
            WHEN n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_prior = 0 AND n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_current > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_prior = 0 AND n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_current = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ((n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_current - n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_prior) / NULLIF(n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_prior, 0)) * 100
          END
        )
      THEN 'Higher' ELSE 'Lower'
    END AS performance_vs_nation,
    CASE WHEN r.both_complete_flag = 1 THEN 'Total Sales' ELSE 'Weekly Average' END AS normalization_basis,
    r.included_week_end_dates_current_qtr,
    r.included_week_end_dates_prior_qtr
  FROM region_quarter_metrics_cte r
  CROSS JOIN nation_quarter_metrics_cte n
)
SELECT
  campus_region,
  quarter_year_current,
  quarter_year_prior,
  quarterly_sales_current_qtr,
  quarterly_sales_prior_qtr,
  growth_qoq_pct,
  region_contribution_pct,
  nation_growth_qoq_pct,
  performance_vs_nation,
  normalization_basis,
  included_week_end_dates_current_qtr,
  included_week_end_dates_prior_qtr
FROM final_calc_cte
ORDER BY CAST(REPLACE(region_contribution_pct, '%', '') AS SIGNED) DESC;

If at least one month incomplete: for each month compute weekly_average_sales = total_sales_included_weeks / weeks_included (integer). Consistent comparison rule: compare total vs total when both complete, otherwise weekly average vs weekly average

WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
  SELECT
    MAX(CASE WHEN max_week_end_date >= DATE('2025-12-31') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dec25_complete,
    MAX(CASE WHEN max_week_end_date >= DATE('2026-01-31') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS jan26_complete
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
monthly_totals_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN month_year = '25-Dec' THEN relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS monthly_sales_dec25,
    SUM(CASE WHEN month_year = '26-Jan' THEN relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS monthly_sales_jan26
  FROM data_867
  WHERE month_year IN ('25-Dec', '26-Jan')
),
weeks_in_period_cte AS (
  SELECT
    month_key,
    COUNT(DISTINCT week_end_date) AS weeks_included,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS total_sales_included_weeks
  FROM (
    SELECT
      d.week_end_date,
      d.relmora_total_mg,
      CASE
        WHEN overlap_days_dec >= 3 THEN '25-Dec'
        WHEN overlap_days_jan >= 3 THEN '26-Jan'
        ELSE NULL
      END AS month_key
    FROM (
      SELECT
        week_end_date,
        relmora_total_mg,
        GREATEST(
          0,
          DATEDIFF(
            LEAST(week_end_date, DATE('2025-12-31')),
            GREATEST(DATE_SUB(week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), DATE('2025-12-01'))
          ) + 1
        ) AS overlap_days_dec,
        GREATEST(
          0,
          DATEDIFF(
            LEAST(week_end_date, DATE('2026-01-31')),
            GREATEST(DATE_SUB(week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), DATE('2026-01-01'))
          ) + 1
        ) AS overlap_days_jan
      FROM data_867
      WHERE month_year IN ('25-Dec', '26-Jan')
    ) d
  ) x
  WHERE month_key IN ('25-Dec', '26-Jan')
  GROUP BY month_key
),
comparison_metrics_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN pc.dec25_complete = 1 AND pc.jan26_complete = 1
        THEN CAST(mt.monthly_sales_dec25 AS SIGNED)
      ELSE CAST(COALESCE(wp_dec.total_sales_included_weeks, 0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(wp_dec.weeks_included, 0), 0) AS SIGNED)
    END AS sales_dec25,
    CASE
      WHEN pc.dec25_complete = 1 AND pc.jan26_complete = 1
        THEN CAST(mt.monthly_sales_jan26 AS SIGNED)
      ELSE CAST(COALESCE(wp_jan.total_sales_included_weeks, 0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(wp_jan.weeks_included, 0), 0) AS SIGNED)
    END AS sales_jan26
  FROM period_completeness_cte pc
  CROSS JOIN monthly_totals_cte mt
  LEFT JOIN weeks_in_period_cte wp_dec
    ON wp_dec.month_key = '25-Dec'
  LEFT JOIN weeks_in_period_cte wp_jan
    ON wp_jan.month_key = '26-Jan'
)
SELECT
  sales_dec25 AS sales_dec25,
  sales_jan26 AS sales_jan26,
  CONCAT(
    CAST(
      ROUND(
        CASE
          WHEN sales_dec25 = 0 AND sales_jan26 > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN sales_dec25 = 0 AND sales_jan26 = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE ((sales_jan26 - sales_dec25) / NULLIF(sales_dec25, 0)) * 100
        END,
        0
      ) AS SIGNED
    ),
    '%'
  ) AS `growth_dec25_to_jan26%`
FROM comparison_metrics_cte;
